logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: order receipts, commit->devlog auto-logger, reservation + partial-release fixes
logs.body:
Orders:
- Fix partial-release dead-end: accepting Partial Release on an over-stock
  item now acknowledges that item and advances the wizard to Payment instead
  of re-firing the overflow dialog (could never click Next before).
- Auto-pop a printable receipt the moment an order is created; add a
  Print Receipt button (saves PNG via html2canvas) on paid orders in the
  order list, admin table, and order detail.

Reservations (Create Reservation dialog):
- Remove the Fulfillment Status field (not relevant to reservations).
- Add 'Partial Payment' to Payment Status.
- Make the item quantity a typeable text box.
- Show an 'Available Stock' column per item with over-stock highlighting.

Tooling:
- Add git post-commit/post-merge hooks + script/devlog-from-git.mjs that
  auto-append commits to client/src/devlogs/devlogs.json.
- Add JOAP_User_Manual.docx (detailed user manual with TOC).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>

logs.label: UI
logs.title: Update login.tsx with latest authentication improvements
logs.body: I refreshed the login component with the latest authentication flow improvements and refined the user experience for first-time visitors.

logs.label: SETUP
logs.title: Updated default admin credentials for seed file
logs.body: I updated the default admin credentials in the seed file to JoapAdmin20Jk / AdminPriv23#Ds for enhanced security during development.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: R13: TOS rewrite with 3-author footer, server tracking, and pool warnings
logs.body: I completely rewrote the Terms of Service dialog with the 3-author footer showing Cabilao Keane Andre B., Ebona John Marwin R., and Mirasol Prince Marl Lizandrelle D. Added server-side TOS acceptance tracking per-user so the prompt follows the account across devices. Implemented Print TOS button that downloads the PDF, added admin/super-admin Download TOS card in Settings, fixed the hammer screen to only show when logged out, and added the new amber pool warning banner showing unclaimed orders with their total value.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: R12: Money-flow hardening and correction-path for payment auditing
logs.body: I added a comprehensive PaymentAudit model that logs every anomaly (invalid formats, duplicates, amount mismatches, after-hours payments, etc.). Built a full GCash reference validator with 8-15 alphanumeric checks, duplicate detection, actor verification, and amount validation. Implemented /api/orders/:id/reverse-payment for admins to safely reverse payments with ledger adjustments, added single-entry reversal for accounting, and created the Daily Payment Audit Report. Orders now enter a new 'Corrected' state with a rose badge when reversed.

logs.label: DOCS
logs.title: Updated README with complete workflow overview
logs.body: I added a new workflow overview section to the README documenting the entire system flow from order creation through payment and release.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: R11: TOS dialog, presence toaster, notification audio, and forgot-password flow
logs.body: I implemented a one-shot TOS dialog with scroll-locking and 8 numbered clauses. Added a presence toaster that slides in from the right for admin sessions when users log in/out with proper audio routing. Built the forgot-password flow with server endpoint that safely notifies admins of password reset requests. Fixed the KPI inventory list so counters match badges using the new stockBands fallback logic.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: R10: Pending Release tab with revenue trend chips and calendar polish
logs.body: I created a new Pending Release page that shows all orders ready for fulfillment with proper status indicators. Extended revenue trends to show Today, 7d, 30d, 3m, and 1y periods with proper data aggregation. Enhanced the calendar with color-coded day chips for different statuses and added the premium Today highlight with gradient background.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: R9: Legacy stock band fallback and Pending Payment status improvements
logs.body: I fixed a critical bug where inventory KPI counters disagreed with row badges by implementing the new stockStatus() method everywhere. Added fallback logic for legacy items so the system calculates stock bands based on reorderLevel when startingStock is zero. Enhanced the Pending Payment table with a STATUS column showing release status and added a Release Item action button.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Session 17 (R8): startingStock thresholds, ROP alerts, and super-admin protection
logs.body: I implemented Item.startingStock snapshots with intelligent stockBands() calculation (Low at 25%, Critical at 12.5%). Built maybeFireROPAlert() to notify admins when stock dips below safety thresholds. Enforced 50% minimum payment threshold for partial payments, made the super-admin account completely untouchable via API, created NumberInput component for cleaner numeric entry without leading zeros, and added duplicate-order detection with admin approval workflow.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Session 16 (R6) final: Smoke test verification and code documentation
logs.body: I ran four comprehensive smoke test cycles and verified all systems worked end-to-end. Revenue calculations proved accurate (0→323, then 0→16,790), inventory management was solid (7→10 items), and double-entry accounting remained perfectly balanced at P17,136. All 19 nav routes rendered correctly without errors.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: Session 16 round 2: KPI overhaul with maximize panels and print functionality
logs.body: I completely overhauled the KPI system with beautiful maximize dialogs that expand to near-fullscreen with Print buttons. Each KPI now renders at 64-88px when maximized and captures to landscape A4 PDF. Built new dashboard expand panels for revenue, orders, margin, and inventory with pagination. The Low-stock card is now amber while Critical stays red for better visual distinction. Inventory printing now uses html2canvas + jsPDF for multi-page PDF output.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: Session 16 round 1: Fullscreen maximize, banner totals, and settings layout
logs.body: I fixed the dashboard pending payments banner to show correct totals by aggregating on the server side. Implemented real fullscreen maximize for charts and KPIs with proper state management. Added zero-stock guards to inventory creation and fixed Settings page CSS from masonry to a clean two-column grid layout.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Session 15 round 3: Live smoke test and double-entry self-healing
logs.body: I created bumpAccountBalance() helper that auto-heals legacy AccountingAccount rows missing proper type metadata. Replaced all raw findOneAndUpdate calls with this new method so the database never crashes on fresh deploys. Ran live smoke test against MongoDB Atlas and verified cash/GCash flows were perfectly balanced.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: Session 15 round 2: Chart overhauls and double-entry ledger fixes
logs.body: I redesigned the Debits vs Credits chart with gradient bars and a custom legend with percentages. Overhauled Account Type Distribution to show a side legend instead of cluttered pie labels. Fixed a critical bug where /api/billing/quick-pay wasn't writing ledger entries, so partial payments now properly update Sales Revenue balances.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Session 15 round 1: Real operations fixes and inventory management
logs.body: I fixed PATCH /api/items/:id to accept all fields (name, category, supplier, price, quantity, reorder level), added DELETE endpoint for items, and removed the customerName requirement from create-order so users can proceed without it. Fixed the Assign-to dropdown to use Popover instead of absolute positioning so it never clips off-screen. Corrected Top Items aggregation to read actual quantity fields and filter cancelled orders. Shifted system shift windows from 06:00-close to 09:00-21:00 morning/evening splits. Added /api/users/online endpoint that returns all active users from the last 15 minutes.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Session 14: Real operations with partial release and notification system
logs.body: I updated default admin to JoapAdmin20Jk with credentials stored in the database. Implemented walk-in paid orders that now book BillingPayment + ledger entries + update account balances immediately. Added a complete Notification model with socket events and a bell icon in the header. Built the employee item-request flow where staff can request inventory additions, admins approve them with password confirmation, and the approval is race-safe with findOneAndUpdate.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Session 13: Sidebar polish, dashboard reorganization, and settings layout
logs.body: I removed the bottom user-profile card from the sidebar since the header already shows user info. Moved Inventory snapshot to the top of the dashboard for better visibility. Fixed Reservations to properly handle reservation-only bookings throughout the workflow. Enhanced inventory status pills with stronger colors (red-600, amber-500, emerald-600) and added them to grid view. Redesigned Settings from CSS masonry to a cleaner two-column layout.

logs.label: SETUP
logs.title: Moved developer time log into self-contained devlogs folder
logs.body: I reorganized the developer time log into client/src/devlogs/ so the entire feature can be removed by deleting one folder and one import. Rewrote entries in first-person narrative and removed build-tooling noise from the history.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Session 11: Live dev time log, light mode default, and source hardening
logs.body: I built a live developer time log that fetches commit history from GitHub API. Set the system to open in light mode by default with a sun/moon toggle in the header. Made Settings responsive with a two-column layout (max-w-5xl). Hardened the production build by removing source maps, dropping console statements, and minifying the code so the source can't be easily read.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Session 10: REQUEST.pdf implementation with reservations and inventory roles
logs.body: I added staff search inside order assign dropdown with pool filtering and 10/page pagination. Built Payment History for Pending Payment with CSV export. Added admin image upload for inventory items in both grid and table with color-coded stock status. Created INVENTORY_MANAGER role for employees that only see inventory. Implemented full backup/restore system with email support and wipe capability. Added forecasting that covers every item with smart fallbacks for sparse data.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed Railway/nixpacks build by pinning Node 20
logs.body: I pinned Node 20.19.0+ because Vite 7 requires crypto.hash which was added in Node 20. Updated package.json engines, .nvmrc, and nixpacks.toml so all deployment tools agree on the version.

logs.label: SETUP
logs.title: Updated build tooling to latest version
logs.body: I upgraded the build dependencies to ensure we're using the latest and most secure versions of all tools.

logs.label: DOCS
logs.title: Ran full 141-point quality audit and consolidated findings
logs.body: I went through every single item on the 141-point checklist and verified it was implemented. Login/auth green, tutorial green, workflows green, presence dots green, performance green, all 19 routes rendering. Documented any honest gaps we'll handle later.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Added Chart of Accounts table with admin delete
logs.body: I surfaced the chart of accounts directly in the Accounting page so admins can see live balances derived from the ledger. Added a Delete button that only works when an account has zero balance, preventing accidental deletion of accounts with history.

logs.label: DOCS
logs.title: Documented Session 8 audit pass with verification matrix
logs.body: I recorded the E2E verification matrix that walked 6 orders, 4 offer types, and a full reservation cycle through all 19 nav routes without errors.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Wired up Inventory CSV import and Print Labels
logs.body: I connected the Inventory CSV import button to parse CSV files with headers (itemName, category, supplierName, unitPrice, currentQuantity) and POST each row to the API. Wired Print Labels to trigger browser print so the inventory page becomes a print-friendly layout.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed release flow and live accounting balance reactivity
logs.body: I fixed the release endpoint to set fulfillmentStatus='completed' and emit DASHBOARD_STATS_UPDATED so the UI updates immediately. Made /api/accounting/accounts derive live balance from ledger totals instead of stale zeros. Added DELETE endpoint for empty accounts and expanded the accountTypeMap to cover all common ledger types.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: Session 7: Full-system audit — Antipolo rebrand and presence dots
logs.body: I did a complete system pass: rebranded Tarlac to Antipolo everywhere, fixed Settings with better scroll containment and added Dark Mode toggle to the Tweaks panel, and made the green employee dot now show real presence (online less than 5 minutes based on lastLogin). Added 11 advanced FAQs to Help covering forecasting, settings, calculator lock, dark mode scope, and more.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: Improved page scrolling by restricting content within tabs
logs.body: I applied scroll containment to tabbed sections across forecasting, help, requests, and system logs so content stays neatly contained within each tab.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Updated Help page and fixed various display issues
logs.body: I refreshed the Help page content and cleaned up several display inconsistencies across the application.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Enhanced features and fixed display issues across multiple pages
logs.body: I enhanced various features throughout the system and resolved display issues that were affecting the user experience.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed accounting errors and improved PDF export
logs.body: I resolved JSX parse errors in the accounting module and improved the PDF export functionality with better field handling.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: Improved in-app tutorial system
logs.body: I enhanced the tutorial flow and fixed various page display issues to improve the onboarding experience.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed broken tutorial steps and polished UI elements
logs.body: I repaired broken tutorial steps and polished various UI elements throughout the interface.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Session 6: Fixed order pool, locked TTS voice, and built ARIMA forecasting
logs.body: I fixed the order pool unassign flow so fulfillmentStatus resets to 'pending', added an inline Return to pool button, and made pool updates immediate via refetchQueries. Locked the announcement voice system-wide to en-US-GuyNeural per specification. Built a pure-TypeScript ARIMA(1,1,1) forecasting module that analyzes sales history and generates 14-day demand forecasts with 95% confidence bands. Created the /api/forecast/items and /api/forecast/aggregate endpoints.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Improved order-assignment notifications and fixed bugs
logs.body: I refactored the TTS queue, updated default voice settings, fixed Settings scroll issues, and enhanced order notification delivery.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Improved dark mode and voice compatibility
logs.body: I improved dark mode handling and ensured voice announcements work consistently across different hosting environments.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed text-to-speech for notifications
logs.body: I replaced the unreliable external TTS with msedge-tts Node.js package for reliable voice notifications.

logs.label: DOCS
logs.title: Wrote comprehensive documentation guide for keeping docs in sync
logs.body: I wrote a detailed internal guide documenting exactly how to keep the project documentation synchronized with the shipped system.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Built animated boot loader, JOAP logo, and README
logs.body: I built an animated boot loader with a hammer guy walking through J-O-A-P with sparks, designed the JOAP logo (crossed hammer and screwdriver on amber gradient), and wrote a comprehensive README with feature list, quick-start guide, and architecture overview.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: Stability pass: ErrorBoundary, tutorial spotlight, and EmptyState polish
logs.body: I added an ErrorBoundary that catches page crashes and shows a recovery card with Try Again and Go Home buttons. Overhauled the tutorial with a 'lightning lock-on' focus effect featuring radial halos and expanding glow rings. Created EmptyState component with 4 tones and wired it to Requests and Pending Payment pages.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Enhanced order management with detailed logging
logs.body: I added comprehensive logging to order detail pages with a detailed modal and richer payment history tracking.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Updated order processing and dashboard statistics
logs.body: I updated the order processing workflow and improved the dashboard statistics display for live data accuracy.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Added comprehensive payment processing and real-time updates
logs.body: I built a detailed payment modal with cash/GCash options, receipt uploads, transaction code generation, and real-time socket events for order updates.

logs.label: SETUP
logs.title: Moved database connection into secure storage
logs.body: I moved the database connection string from code into secure environment variable storage for production safety.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: Session 4: UX polish with header cleanup and inventory editing
logs.body: I removed the global search and notification bell from the header, keeping only essential elements (SidebarTrigger, Breadcrumbs, LiveClock in 12-hour PH format, user pill, Logout). Added inventory edit dialog with support for price, quantity, category, and supplier changes. Built daily sales goal settings and peak hours export functionality. Added user-log target picker and SaaS-style employee profile modal with gradient hero and productivity charts.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed local server boot on Windows and offers query bug
logs.body: I wrapped the reusePort socket option in an isWindows check so the dev server starts on Windows. Fixed offers query to fallback to empty array instead of undefined.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: Adopted the definitive UI design across the system
logs.body: I replaced all pages with the definitive UI design featuring new components (Sparkline, RingGauge, PaymentMixDonut, Heatmap, KpiCard, PageHeader). Overhauled dashboard, inventory, orders, reservations, billing, settings, and all other pages with consistent design language.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: UI overhaul: Modern slate-and-amber theme with Manrope font
logs.body: I completely redesigned the theme with slate neutrals and amber primary colors. Added Manrope font for UI and JetBrains Mono for numerics. Built breadcrumb navigation, live PHT clock, and Tweaks panel for appearance customization. Header now has a 3-zone layout with ⌘K search shortcut.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Shipped massive feature update with multiple improvements
logs.body: I shipped a large feature bundle: new About page showing 3 developers and tech stack, admin orders view grouped by employee, draggable floating calculator with memory, Pending Payment nav with badge count, calendar view for system logs, user deactivation with reactivation support, reservation deletion with password confirmation, offers duplicate checking, and various settings fixes.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Built complete order assignment system with voice and task-lock
logs.body: I built the order assignment system with voice announcements for assignments, task-locking so employees hold only one active order at a time, and a 3-step processing lifecycle (claim → start-processing → complete-processing). Added /api/orders?pool=true for FIFO pool management and global Socket.io notifications.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed boot errors and added accounting PDF export with charts
logs.body: I fixed startup errors by creating server_mongo.ts with hardcoded Atlas URI and env-var overrides. Fixed TypeScript errors using Array.from() for MapIterator compatibility. Added accounting PDF export with bar charts, pie charts with legends, and complete ledger tables. Hardened MongoDB connection with idempotent connect() logic.

logs.label: SETUP
logs.title: Cleaned up repository and removed local assets from tracking
logs.body: I cleaned up the repository by keeping local asset drops and runtime data out of version control.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Enabled text-to-speech playback for order confirmations
logs.body: I enabled TTS audio playback for order confirmations so users can hear order updates.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Improved loading speed by fixing server and HMR issues
logs.body: I fixed server crash on compilation errors and ensured Hot Module Replacement connects correctly for faster development iteration.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Improved performance with authentication and database optimization
logs.body: I optimized authentication with in-memory session caching and added missing MongoDB indexes to the Order model for faster queries.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Added voice announcements and enhanced reservation management
logs.body: I added text-to-speech functionality throughout the system and built comprehensive reservation management features.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed critical errors preventing application startup
logs.body: I resolved TypeScript errors and configuration issues that were blocking the application from running.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed dashboard loading errors
logs.body: I fixed import issues and configuration problems that prevented the dashboard from loading correctly.

logs.label: DOCS
logs.title: Set up project documentation and initial system changes
logs.body: I established comprehensive project documentation covering initial system changes, feature decisions, and architectural foundations.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Refactored application structure and fixed startup scripts
logs.body: I removed the MAIN-APP folder, fixed the npm dev script to use tsx binary explicitly, and updated core dependencies.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Updated order schema with payment and fulfillment status
logs.body: I refactored the Order model to include orderType, orderChannel, paymentStatus, paymentMethod, and deliveryFee fields. Built a 3-step order creation panel and new offers engine.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Enhanced reporting, settings, and dashboard features
logs.body: I built new API endpoints for offer management, improved order processing logic, and enhanced dashboard data aggregation.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Added reservations page with calendar and list views
logs.body: I created a new Reservations page with calendar and list viewing modes, stock alerts, and full workflow support. Added upcoming reservations to the dashboard and installed xlsx for spreadsheet support.

logs.label: DOCS
logs.title: Added detailed documentation for dashboard, orders, and inventory
logs.body: I documented the dashboard features, order management workflow, and inventory enhancements with live update descriptions.

logs.label: DOCS
logs.title: Created replit.md with project overview and feature backlog
logs.body: I wrote comprehensive project documentation covering the tech stack and complete feature backlog.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Improved application features and fixed various bugs
logs.body: I enhanced PDF export formatting, enforced concurrent login rules, improved dashboard elements, and fixed fulfillment status handling.

logs.label: DOCS
logs.title: Updated documentation for system changes and feature updates
logs.body: I documented all system changes including concurrent login enforcement and various UI/backend improvements.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Implemented reorder point formula for inventory management
logs.body: I replaced manual reorder input with formula-based calculation using average daily usage, lead time, and safety stock fields. The system now automatically computes optimal reorder levels.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Enhanced backup and restore functionality for databases
logs.body: I increased JSON body limit to 50MB for large backups, included users in backup/restore operations, and added migration guides.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Added order locking and assignment features
logs.body: I implemented order locking with timestamps, takeover capabilities, and enhanced employee/admin order views for better workflow management.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed interactive tutorial and improved stability
logs.body: I addressed audio looping issues, fixed mouse cursor sync, improved UI visibility, and resolved user management errors.

logs.label: CHECKPOINT
logs.title: Saved progress checkpoint
logs.body: I saved the current state of all work as a checkpoint for version control.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Added MongoDB Atlas IP access list documentation
logs.body: I documented the MongoDB Atlas configuration and added supporting images for setup reference.

logs.label: CHECKPOINT
logs.title: Saved progress at loop end
logs.body: I saved all changes at the end of the development loop.

logs.label: DEPLOYMENT
logs.title: Published application to production
logs.body: I deployed the application to the production environment successfully.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Added comprehensive UI components and page structure
logs.body: I initialized the UI component library with buttons, cards, dialogs, and set up the core application pages and routing infrastructure.

logs.label: INITIAL
logs.title: Initial project setup and foundation
logs.body: I set up the complete project structure, installed dependencies, and established the foundation for the full-stack application.
